positive: A mystical, ethereal fox spirit sitting amidst blooming bioluminescent flora. The fox should have a magnificent, flowing tail and sharp, intelligent eyes. The scene composition should be centralized and balanced, featuring strong silhouettes of the fox and foliage against a deep, gradient twilight background (midnight blues, sapphire, emerald). Use a highly stylized, modern vector art style mixed with cosmic watercolor textures. High contrast is key, emphasizing negative space and vibrant glowing details from the flora. Perfect for apparel printing, minimal details should be retained for clear vinyl transfer or DTG print, looking elegant and mysterious. Cinematic lighting, volumetric glow, rich color palette, intricate linework.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, noise, low resolution, multiple people, deformed, ugly, poorly drawn, out of frame, grainy, cartoonish, realistic photo
